_comment: Cost-summary playbook query #2: type x location cross-cut, scoped in supported KQL.

parameters.query: Resources | where subscriptionId in~ ('77777777-7777-7777-7777-777777777777', '88888888-8888-8888-8888-888888888888') | summarize count_=count() by type, location | order by count_ desc | take 15
